headlines.headline: Talvix Holdings completes strategic acquisition to strengthen enterprise software

sentiment.reasoning: A regulatory review introduces uncertainty, potential fines, operational changes, and reputational risk, which are negative financial signals.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
